fn_def_list.fn_code:
static int
arm_stap_is_single_operand (struct gdbarch *gdbarch, const char *s)
{
  return (*s == '#' || *s == '$' || isdigit (*s) /* Literal number.  */
	  || *s == '[' /* Register indirection or
			  displacement.  */
	  || isalpha (*s)); /* Register value.  */
}
